chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3459 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.15338/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 06.03.2025 Mr.Abdul Moiz Jaferii, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Masooda Siraj, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Nadir Hussain, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Irfan Mir Halepota, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Per learned counsel finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks for directions to the respondents to finalize the assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action may be taken against the petitioner. He further states that the security put in place shall be subject to the aforesaid adjudication. Learned counsel for the respondent (F.B.R) articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
